parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '🎯 *Product:* ' + $json.product + '
' + '🧪 *Test File:* `' + $json.filename + '`
' + '*Status:* ' + ($json.status === 'passed' ? '✅ PASSED' : '❌ FAILED') + '
' + '*Stats:* ' + ($json.stats.passed || 0) + '/' + ($json.stats.total || 0) + ' passed
' + '*Duration:* ' + ($json.duration || 'N/A') + '

' + '*Test Cases:*
' + ($json.reportSummary || 'See full report for details') }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 ERP Test Failed: ' + $json.filename }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

🚨 Test Failure Alert

Product:' + $json.product + '
Test Script:' + $json.filename + '
Exit Code:' + $json.exitCode + '
Duration:' + $json.duration + '
Timestamp:' + $json.timestamp + '

Error Details:

' + ($json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'No error details captured').replace(/[\u001b\u009b][[\]()#;?]*(?:(?:(?:[a-zA-Z\\d]*(?:;[-a-zA-Z\\d\/#&.:=?%@~_]*)*)?\u0007)|(?:(?:\d{1,4}(?:;\d{0,4})*)?[\dA-PR-TZcf-ntqry=><~]))/g, '') + '
Generated by QAutoX Automation Suite
' }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '*' + $json.product + ' Full Suite Summary*

' + '📅 *Date:* ' + $json.timestamp + '
' + '✅ *Passed:* ' + $json.passedCases + '
' + '❌ *Failed:* ' + $json.failedCases + '
' + '🎯 *Success Rate:* ' + $json.successRate + '

*🧪 Detailed Test Report:*
' + $json.testCaseReport }}
